title: scabiosa communis var. glabrescens
intro: Scabiosa communis var. glabrescens, also known as the scabiosa or pincushion flower, is a perennial plant species in the borage family that is native to Europe, western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Scabiosa communis var. glabrescens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Scabiosa communis var. glabrescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
